requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and SWASA Conformity Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及SWASA合格评定证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及SWASA合格評定證據

summary.en: SWASA is Eswatini's standards authority. For EV charging equipment, exporters should prepare IEC-family safety evidence suitable for SWASA conformity review and project-owner acceptance. IEC 61851-1 provides the conductive EV supply equipment baseline for control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and safe disconnection. IEC 61851-23 covers DC EV supply equipment. Project packages should also include enclosure protection, installation instructions, markings, and evidence for the intended outdoor or indoor operating environment.
summary.zh: SWASA是埃斯瓦蒂尼标准机构。对于电动汽车充电设备，出口商应准备适用于SWASA合格评定审查和项目业主验收的IEC体系安全证据。IEC 61851-1规定传导式电动汽车供电设备基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、互锁、过流及过温保护和安全断开。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车供电设备。项目资料包还应包括外壳防护、安装说明、标识，以及适用于目标室外或室内运行环境的证据。
summary.zht: SWASA是埃斯瓦蒂尼標準機構。對於電動汽車充電設備，出口商應準備適用於SWASA合格評定審查和項目業主驗收的IEC體系安全證據。IEC 61851-1規定傳導式電動汽車供電設備基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、互鎖、過流及過溫保護和安全斷開。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車供電設備。項目資料包還應包括外殼防護、安裝說明、標識，以及適用於目標室外或室內運行環境的證據。

standards_or_laws: SWASA standards and conformity assessment functions
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China's comparable safety baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, used with GB/T connector and communication standards. It can support engineering comparison, but China GB/T evidence is not the same as IEC 61851 evidence for a SWASA, ESERA, EEC, importer, or project-owner review. A clause-level gap matrix and IEC-accredited test reports may be needed for Eswatini-facing documentation.
summary.zh: 中国可比安全基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并与GB/T接口和通信标准配套使用。该证据可支持工程比较，但中国GB/T证据并不等同于SWASA、ESERA、EEC、进口商或项目业主审查所需的IEC 61851证据。面向埃斯瓦蒂尼的文件可能需要逐条差距矩阵和IEC认可测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比安全基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並與GB/T接口和通訊標準配套使用。該證據可支持工程比較，但中國GB/T證據並不等同於SWASA、ESERA、EEC、進口商或項目業主審查所需的IEC 61851證據。面向埃斯瓦蒂尼的文件可能需要逐條差距矩陣和IEC認可測試報告。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare IEC 61851-1 and, for DC chargers, IEC 61851-23 evidence; protective-device ratings; earthing, isolation, emergency-stop and safe-disconnection descriptions; enclosure IP evidence for the intended site; English documentation; and an explicit mapping from any GB/T evidence to IEC clauses. China-only GB/T safety reports should be treated as a starting point, not as SWASA-ready conformity evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1证据，以及直流充电桩的IEC 61851-23证据；保护器件额定值；接地、绝缘、急停和安全断开说明；目标场地外壳IP防护证据；英文文件；并将任何GB/T证据明确映射到IEC条款。仅中国GB/T安全报告应视为起点，而非可直接提交SWASA的合格评定证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1證據，以及直流充電樁的IEC 61851-23證據；保護器件額定值；接地、絕緣、急停和安全斷開說明；目標場地外殼IP防護證據；英文文件；並將任何GB/T證據明確映射到IEC條款。僅中國GB/T安全報告應視為起點，而非可直接提交SWASA的合格評定證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory conformity gate where SWASA, importer, customs, EEC-connected project, tender, or site owner requires standards evidence; exact route should be confirmed for the HS code and product configuration
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for Eswatini without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Eswatini safety file around IEC 61851 evidence and SWASA conformity review, using GB/T 18487 only as a mapped design reference. DC products should include IEC 61851-23 evidence before project acceptance is claimed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃斯瓦蒂尼安全文件应以IEC 61851证据和SWASA合格评定审查为核心，仅将GB/T 18487作为经映射的设计参考。直流产品在宣称项目验收前应包括IEC 61851-23证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃斯瓦蒂尼安全文件應以IEC 61851證據和SWASA合格評定審查為核心，僅將GB/T 18487作為經映射的設計參考。直流產品在宣稱項目驗收前應包括IEC 61851-23證據。
